title: About Centene: Who We Are
note: Provides Centene's member scale, public-program focus, national footprint, employee count, and locally oriented health-plan positioning.

title: Centene 2025 Form 10-K Annual Report
note: Provides consolidated 2025 revenue, net loss, impairment, medical costs, segment context, Marketplace pressure, and managed-care operating disclosures.

note: Provides current market capitalization, share price, conventional P/E availability, profile, and last-checked market-data context.

title: Centene (CNC) Market Capitalization
note: Provides Centene's market-cap page, market-cap history, share price, and public-company valuation context.

title: Ambetter Health | Affordable Health Insurance Plans
note: Documents Ambetter's Marketplace plan shopping, member account, provider search, pharmacy, rewards, care-management, ICHRA, and state-coverage features.

title: Wellcare Medicare Advantage Plans
note: Documents Wellcare's Medicare Advantage, HMO, PPO, special needs, prescription drug, member portal, provider, pharmacy, and plan-document workflows.

title: openIMIS Home Page
note: Describes openIMIS as open-source software and a digital public good for health financing and social protection programs, with reported beneficiary and country reach.

title: CMS Interoperability and Prior Authorization Final Rule CMS-0057-F
note: Defines payer API, patient access, provider access, payer-to-payer, and prior authorization interoperability requirements affecting Medicare Advantage, Medicaid managed care, CHIP managed care, and QHP issuers on federally facilitated exchanges.
